traps.description: ChamberAggregator::ingest mutates the nested unordered_map without synchronisation. Undefined behaviour under concurrent calls.
traps.summary: ingest() mutates the shared map with no synchronisation — UB under concurrency.

traps.description: compute_running_stats uses (sum_sq - sum^2/n)/(n-1). Catastrophic cancellation produces NaN or 0 stddev for series like 760 +/- 0.001 Torr.
traps.summary: Running-stats formula suffers catastrophic cancellation, giving NaN or zero stddev.

traps.description: ingest() does not check whether (chamber, wafer) has been completed; late readings re-create freed wafer state, leaking memory and corrupting downstream records.
traps.summary: Late readings resurrect completed wafers, leaking memory and corrupting records.

traps.description: Candidate-implemented ExcursionReporter must drain pending excursions and join its worker in the destructor. Easy to forget; causes lost events on scope exit.
traps.summary: Reporter destructor doesn't drain/join its worker, dropping pending excursions.
